title: The Lady and the Mob
writer: Richard Maibaum, Gertrude Purcell, George Bradshaw
actors: Fay Bainter, Ida Lupino, Lee Bowman
plot: Society-lady Hattie Leonard organizes her own band of 'gang-busters' when she discovers a garment she sent to the dry-cleaners had been taxed 25 cents to pay for gang 'protection.' She sends to New York City for a reformed gangste...
